headline: Bergvall's camp in talks for Tottenham summer exit
body: Lucas Bergvall's representatives have initiated discussions with clubs regarding a potential summer transfer, as the player desires to leave Tottenham.
text:
🚨🇸🇪 Lucas Bergvall’s camp has started talks with clubs to explore best solution for his future.

Clear desire to leave Tottenham with club already informed, as @TheAthleticFC reported.

Bergvall open to discussions ahead of potential summer move.
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report RUMOUR | Bergvall's camp in talks for Tottenham summer exit

#FPLVortex #Transfers #THFC #PremierLeague
